title: nOS plugin manifest
description: Validates plugin.yml under files/anatomy/plugins/<name>/. Three behavioral classes (skill / service / composition) are union-typed via top-level `type` array. Source plugins (e.g. authentik-base) declare `aggregates`. See files/anatomy/docs/plugin-loader-spec.md for field source attributions.

type.description: One or more shapes. Note: skill/service/composition are MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE behavioral classes; scheduled-job/ui-extension/notifier are capability mixins.

role.description: Service plugin: which Tier-1 role must be installed.

apps_manifest.description: Composition-Tier-2 plugin: which apps/<name>.yml triggers this.

app.description: Tier-2 binding shorthand: plugin no-ops unless apps catalog enables this slug.

plugin.description: DAG edges — plugins that must be loaded before this one.

peer_service.description: Cross-service binding: this plugin's role coexists with a sibling infra service (e.g. portainer-base ↔ docker_socket_proxy). Documentation-only today; loader doesn't enforce.

capability_consumers.description: Components that need this plugin's substrate ready before they boot (e.g. qdrant-base capability_consumers: [bone, wing]).

feature_flag.description: Ansible var name (e.g. install_observability) that gates activation.

variables.description: Var names referenced by manifest Jinja — loader pre-checks they're defined.

aggregates.description: Source plugins (e.g. authentik-base) harvest blocks from other loaded plugins / agent profiles into a merged input. See V4 inventory SR-1.

block_path.description: Top-level key in target manifests to harvest (e.g. 'authentik').

output_var.description: Where to deposit the aggregated list on this plugin's inputs.<output_var>.

lifecycle.description: Per-hook action lists. Each entry is an arbitrary action object — loader interprets the well-known keys (ensure_dir, render, render_compose_extension, copy_dashboards, wait_health, remove_dir).

template.description: Path under plugin dir to a docker-compose extension Jinja template.

target_service.description: MUST match the role's compose template service name (V3 P2).

hardening_refs.description: REM-* IDs from docs/llm/security/scan-state.json that this compose extension implements (e.g. ['REM-001'] for portainer socket-proxy least-privilege).

provisioning.description: Loader-specific shape — see grafana-base/plugin.yml for the canonical example.

authentik.description: OIDC client metadata. The plugin loader's authentik-base aggregator harvests these blocks and renders them into Authentik blueprints. See docs/native-sso-survey.md for the SSO trichotomy.

tier.description: Required if block present. RBAC tier 1 (admin) - 4 (guest).

mode.description: nOS doctrine label (β1.A, 2026-05-05). native_oidc: service consumes OIDC at app level. header_oidc: Authentik proxy outpost forwards Remote-User/Remote-Email; service auto-creates user from headers (true SSO without OIDC client in service). forward_auth: pure access gate; no per-user state in service.

provider_type.description: Schema-canonical alias of mode. `oauth2` ≡ `native_oidc`, `proxy` ≡ `forward_auth` for back-compat with central authentik_oidc_apps shape.

schema.description: Paths to .sql migration files run idempotently against wing.db.
